headline: Meta's AI ambitions clash with internal turmoil over surveillance
body: Meta is scaling AI capabilities while facing significant employee morale issues tied to workplace monitoring practices. The company's push toward AI-driven features, including WhatsApp incognito mode for private AI chats, signals aggressive expansion in conversational AI and privacy-adjacent offerings. For healthcare AI vendors and consultants, this matters: Meta's infrastructure powers communication platforms used by patient engagement vendors and digital health startups, and internal instability could affect API reliability and feature rollouts. Additionally, Meta's privacy mode developments may influence how healthcare organizations approach messaging integrations with EHRs and patient communication tools. Watch whether these internal tensions impact Meta's healthcare-adjacent AI roadmap and timeline.
